_comment: Fila de conteúdo do Memory Lab. status: pending | done. A rotina diária consome os 'pending' mais ao topo, gera o artigo, e marca 'done' com a data. NÃO repetir slugs já publicados (14 iniciais).

queue.title: Why Bill Gates Is Investing Millions in Alzheimer's Research
queue.angle: FACTUAL ONLY: Gates's real personal investment in Alzheimer's/dementia research (Dementia Discovery Fund, ADDF) and why; tie to brain-health awareness. Do NOT claim Gates endorses or studied any supplement.

queue.title: Bill Gates's Bet on Beating Dementia — and What It Means for You
queue.angle: FACTUAL: early-detection push, research funding; reader takeaways for protecting memory. No fabricated endorsement.

queue.title: 3 Brain-Health Lessons From Bill Gates's Push Against Alzheimer's
queue.angle: FACTUAL: early detection, lifestyle, research; funnel to memory support. No fake claims.

queue.title: Bill Gates on His Father's Alzheimer's — and What It Taught Him
queue.angle: FACTUAL: Bill Gates Sr. had Alzheimer's; Gates wrote/spoke about it publicly. Empathetic, real quotes only.

queue.title: The Early Alzheimer's Blood Test Bill Gates Helped Fund
queue.angle: FACTUAL: Gates funded early-detection diagnostics (Diagnostics Accelerator/ADDF). Explain real science of early detection.

queue.title: Is There a 'Bill Gates Brain Pill'? The Truth Behind the Viral Ads
queue.angle: DEBUNK (critical): Bill Gates does NOT endorse any brain pill; warn that those ads are SCAMS using his name. Then pivot to what actually supports memory + our editorial pick. Must clearly state it's a scam, never imply endorsement.

queue.title: What Bill Gates Predicts About Beating Alzheimer's
queue.angle: FACTUAL: use real, sourced Gates statements about treatment/diagnosis timelines. No invented quotes.

queue.title: Inside the Diagnostics Accelerator Bill Gates Co-Founded
queue.angle: FACTUAL: explain the initiative + why early detection matters for readers.

queue.title: What Bill Gates Says About Preventing Dementia
queue.angle: FACTUAL: sourced statements + evidence-based prevention takeaways; funnel to memory support.

queue.title: Bill Gates and the Billionaires Funding the Fight Against Alzheimer's
queue.angle: FACTUAL: Gates, Zuckerberg/CZI, etc. Broadens beyond one name to avoid over-reliance.
